title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
